strengths: Hands-on full-stack experience with the exact primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Well over the 6+ years requirement — 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, including senior roles at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and Dunnhumby
Strong engineering craft: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes, AWS CDK, MongoDB, and a track record of teaching/workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (though Node/TS depth makes ramp-up trivial)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
Most recent DB work centers on MongoDB; PostgreSQL not explicitly called out

key_factors.factor: Direct fit with TypeScript/Node.js/React + AI-agent tooling
Senior-level depth far exceeding 6+ years requirement
Proven engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, architecture, performance)

response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for this Senior Fullstack role: his current re:cinq work maps directly onto the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and the AI-agent requirement, where he is already building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks. With 15+ years across product, platform, and infrastructure work — including high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby, AWS CDK pricing systems at Optilyz, and GraphQL platforms at RIDE Capital — he comfortably clears the 6+ year bar and brings architecture, scalability, and performance experience. His craftsmanship credentials (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS libraries like Fluent-Asserts and Trial) signal exactly the code-quality and code-review culture the role asks for, and his polyglot background makes the Kotlin/Java secondary stack a low-risk ramp.
